title: Implement a Character Class for a Role-Playing Game

content.problemStatement:
In this task, you will implement a character class for a role-playing game using multiple inheritance. The character should have attributes and abilities from different classes: Warrior, Mage, and Rogue.

Create a base class called Character with basic attributes like name and level. Then create three classes: Warrior (with strength attribute), Mage (with intelligence attribute), and Rogue (with agility attribute). Finally, create a PlayerCharacter class that inherits from all these classes using multiple inheritance.

The PlayerCharacter class should have a method called display_stats() that shows all the character's attributes.

Example test case:
Input:
Elara
5

Output:
Name: Elara
Level: 5
Strength: 10
Intelligence: 10
Agility: 10

Your task is to implement the classes and the multiple inheritance structure to create the PlayerCharacter class.

sampleTestCases.output:
Name: Elara
Level: 5
Strength: 10
Intelligence: 10
Agility: 10

hidden.expectedOutput:
Name: Elara
Level: 5
Strength: 10
Intelligence: 10
Agility: 10
